prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2024年理科最低位次约54名，2025年物理类最低位次约81名，两年间位次后移约27名，2025年基准位次约81名。该校在宁夏招生计划极少（2-4人），位次波动幅度较大；2024年理科计划2人，2025年物理类计划增至4人，2026年物理类计划缩至2人，较2025年缩招50%。缩招意味着竞争名额减少，理论上应推动位次前移（数字减小）。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；上海交通大学软科主榜排名第4（2026年），稳居全国顶尖行列。上海交通大学医学院临床医学为A+学科，口腔医学为A+学科，基础医学为A-，生物学A+，药学A+，医学学科实力全国顶尖；2026年高考周期内上海交通大学声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及学术不端（撤稿数量较多）及学生管理事件，可能对部分考生报考心理产生轻微抑制作用。抖音热度排名第42位（较热），短视频平台曝光度中等偏上。历史投档异常记录中未见该校在宁夏有明显断档信号；临床医学（A+）、口腔医学（A+）、基础医学（A-）、生物学（A+）、药学（A+），均为A类学科。该校在宁夏招生专业为临床医学（八年制本博连读），直接对应A+学科，学科吸引力极强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学专业在2024年专业热度分析中），持续高热推荐；口腔医学）。医学类专业整体报考热度居高不下。宁夏2026年普通高考考生总数约66000人（不确定），2025年物理类44491人+历史类21406人=65897人，考生规模基本持平。；上海交通大学医学院位于上海市，属跨省招生。该校在宁夏招生人数极少（2-4人），属于典型的小名额高竞争模式，位次对招生计划变化极为敏感。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次81名、2026年缩招50%（从4人降至2人）这一核心因素。考虑到临床医学专业持续高热、学校顶尖层次带来的强吸引力，以及声誉偏负面带来的轻微抑制，在57名基础上微调至60名。预计2026年最低录取位次约60名，区间30-90名。缩招是推动位次前移的最关键因素，专业高热和学校层次则对位次形成支撑。

- 临床医学（八年制本博连读）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2: 暂无（该校在宁夏仅开设一个招生专业）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3: 暂无（该校在宁夏仅开设一个招生专业）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 上海交通大学医学院在宁夏仅招收临床医学（八年制本博连读）一个专业，无分档选择空间。预测位次约60名（区间30-90名），位次在此区间内的考生可积极报考。该专业为A+学科、八年本博连读培养模式，属于国内最顶尖的医学教育项目，适合立志从医且成绩极优异的考生。由于招生名额极少（仅2人），位次波动较大，建议位次在30名以内的考生作为稳妥选择，位次在60名左右的考生作为冲刺目标。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2024, the minimum ranking for science was approximately 54, and in 2025, the minimum ranking for physics category was approximately 81, with a backward shift of about 27 positions over two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 81. The university has a very small enrollment plan in Ningxia (2-4 students), leading to significant ranking fluctuations; in 2024, the science plan was 2 students, in 2025, the physics category plan increased to 4 students, and in 2026, the physics category plan decreased to 2 students, a 50% reduction compared to 2025. A reduction in enrollment means fewer competitive slots, theoretically pushing the ranking forward (smaller number).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; Shanghai Jiao Tong University ranks 4th on the Soft Science main list (2026), firmly among the top in the country. Shanghai Jiao Tong University School of Medicine has Clinical Medicine as an A+ discipline, Stomatology as A+, Basic Medicine as A-, Biology as A+, Pharmacy as A+, with top-tier medical discipline strength nationwide; during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, Shanghai Jiao Tong University's reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving academic misconduct (relatively high number of retractions) and student management incidents, which may have a slight inhibitory effect on some candidates' application psychology. Douyin popularity ranks 42nd (relatively hot), with medium-high exposure on short video platforms. Historical enrollment anomaly records show no obvious gaps for the university in Ningxia; Clinical Medicine (A+), Stomatology (A+), Basic Medicine (A-), Biology (A+), Pharmacy (A+), all are A-class disciplines. The university enrolls in Ningxia for Clinical Medicine (eight-year combined bachelor's and doctoral program), directly corresponding to an A+ discipline, with extremely strong disciplinary appeal.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Clinical Medicine major, in the 2024 major popularity analysis, continues to be highly recommended; Stomatology. Medical majors overall maintain high application popularity. The total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Ningxia in 2026 is about 66,000 (uncertain), with 44,491 in physics category and 21,406 in history category in 2025, totaling 65,897, with candidate scale basically stable. Shanghai Jiao Tong University School of Medicine is located in Shanghai, involving cross-province enrollment. The university enrolls very few students in Ningxia (2-4), typical of small quota high competition mode, with rankings highly sensitive to enrollment plan changes.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 81 and the 2026 enrollment reduction of 50% (from 4 to 2 students) as the core factor. Considering the sustained high popularity of Clinical Medicine, the strong appeal of the top-tier university level, and the slight inhibition from the negative reputation, fine-tune from 57 to 60. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will be about 60, with a range of 30-90. The enrollment reduction is the most critical factor pushing the ranking forward, while the high popularity of the major and the university level provide support for the ranking.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Shanghai Jiao Tong University School of Medicine only enrolls for Clinical Medicine (Eight-Year Combined Bachelor's and Doctoral Program) in Ningxia, with no tier selection options. The predicted ranking is about 60 (range 30-90), and candidates within this ranking range can actively apply. This major is an A+ discipline with an eight-year combined bachelor's and doctoral training model, representing one of the top medical education programs in China, suitable for candidates who aspire to medicine and have extremely outstanding scores. Due to the very small enrollment quota (only 2 students), rankings fluctuate significantly; it is recommended that candidates with rankings within 30 consider it a safe choice, and those with rankings around 60 consider it a reach goal.
